traits.description: A collection of all card traits in the game, defining their properties and behaviors.

items.description: A trait definition that specifies the properties and behaviors of a trait that can be applied to cards.

name.description: The TraitStateName, this should be the name of a Class inheriting from CardTraitBase. This can be a class from the base game, a class from your Plugin (preceded by an @), or an object with id and mod_reference to refer to a class in someone else's mod.

trait_is_removable.description: Determines if the trait can be removed via a CardUpgrade (remove_trait_upgrades).

draw_in_deployment_phase.description: Enables the card to be drawn during the deployment phase

param_int.description:
Active Moon Phases^ Phases when upgrade is applied.

Upgrade will be automatically removed (including any upgrade Traits) when Out-of-Phase.

param_int_2.description:
Moon Phase Modifier Mode^ How Moon Phase Modifiers for rooms impact when upgrade is applied.

Additive - Global Phase and Modifiers are valid.
Exclusive - Modifiers override Global Phase
Ignore - Modifiers always ignored

param_upgrade.description: Upgrade to Apply^ Automatically removed (including any upgrade Traits) when Out-of-Phase

name.description: The TraitStateName, this should be the name of a Class inheriting from CardTraitBase. This can be a class from the base game, a class from your Plugin (preceded by an @), or an object with id and mod_reference to refer to a class in someone else's mod.

trait_is_removable.description: Determines if the trait can be removed via a CardUpgrade (remove_trait_upgrades).

draw_in_deployment_phase.description: Enables the card to be drawn during the deployment phase

param_bool.description:
Count Attacker Status Stacks^ TRUE - Stacks on Attacker

FALSE - Stacks on Target

param_bool.description: Check corruption amount from character room^ The corruption amount will be checked from the room the character is in (not from the destination).

name.description: The TraitStateName, this should be the name of a Class inheriting from CardTraitBase. This can be a class from the base game, a class from your Plugin (preceded by an @), or an object with id and mod_reference to refer to a class in someone else's mod.

param_card.description: Reference to an id for a card for a parameter

param_card_type.description: Card type target parameter for reading TrackedValue statistics.

param_description.description: Localized text for a description parameter.

param_entry_duration.description: Duration of the tracked value statistic to fetch

param_str.description: String parameter. Note this isn't a localized string.

param_tracked_value.description: The tracked variable statistic to get for the trait. Usually used for scaling card traits.

param_use_scaling_params.description: A boolean, for use scaling params. It is unused

stack_mode.description: Card trait stack mode. Controls the behaviour when the trait is applied to a card multiple times. This only applies when the trait is added via an upgrade. Traits that are initially present on a card, with card text will not have the text updated.

trait_is_removable.description: Determines if the trait can be removed via a CardUpgrade (remove_trait_upgrades).
